feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /int/ International: >escape their impoverished homeland in the hope of a better life, taking jobs th…
entry.content: >escape their impoverished homeland in the hope of a better life, taking jobs that locals don't want. >get bullied, beaten and harassed just because they came from a less developed country. Why are people so harsh to them? They didn't choose where they were born, so why should they be denied the right to choose how they live?

entry.title: /int/ International: Being autistic is pain
entry.content: >The only man I ever loved, a Swedish man (yes I am a woman)left me because he says he loves me but I am annoying. When I literally tried my best to be here for him, being calm when he was always mad at me, to be kind, to better myself,and even suggested giving him space if he is mad at me. But that doesn't mean anything because annoying autists like me are worth less than neuro typical people Does this happen in your country

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Peaky Blinders thread
entry.content: >Ladies and gentlemen, this has been a wonderful evening. And not only for the music and the dancing. It has also been about us, the people gathered here. English people in the very heart of England. There are no people I would rather be among, no place I would rather be and no time I would rather be alive, because ever since the terrible events of October, when the money markets betrayed us all. I want to tell you good folk first, I will be setting a new course, setting up a new political movem

entry.title: /b/ Random: You're male
entry.content: You will never be a woman. Your chromosomes are you. Your body continues to make your own hormones, despite trying to block them. Tolerance builds. Your hair around your head receeds and it accumulates everywhere else. Your ears and adams apple continue to grow. Your masculine beard becomes harder to clear. You know your five minutes is up, as you stare blankly at the fat surrounding your stomach. Your back now has thick hair, your toes have hair, and the back of your fingers have it. You smell

entry.title: /o/ Auto: R-A-P-E-D A-P-E
entry.content: Why wouldn’t this work? Trying to get AC in my car, it’s getting too hot here. It’s crude but would it work? I’m too stupid to figure out the factory AC system. Just going to cobble something together instead. The top one has the pressure switch hot. The bottom one has the pressure switch as a switched ground. Will post schematic image after the lust provoking image in this post.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Hollow Knight is such a pretty game. This is what passion feels like, these aust…
entry.content: Hollow Knight is such a pretty game. This is what passion feels like, these australians really poured their heart out while making this game. Could this feeling ever be replicated in a platformer? I know people would say Ori and the Blind Forest, but to me this game is special. The Knight is a special kind of character.

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Bought a century 55D23L battery for my sister's Toyota estima (I think 2019 and …
entry.content: Bought a century 55D23L battery for my sister's Toyota estima (I think 2019 and petrol, not hybrid) because she had a few days where she had issues starting the car and had to be jump started despite being driven decently. Thought maybe cos it's 7 or so months old maybe we should just change the battery because we don't know how old the current one is It's the battery the internet was recommending (ai/google search) and the battery shops were recommending when I checked online and in-store. Anyw

entry.title: /int/ International: Canadians are sadists who love to bully South Asian children.
entry.content: Many people think Canada is an anti-racist country, but I suffered severe KKK, Neo Nazi level racism here at the hands of white people as a South Asian.

entry.content: Archive search is broken edition Previous: https://desuarchive.org/trash/threa d/83554589/ Note: There is not, and there will never be, an official /dig/ discord server. entry.title: /int/ International: Why is Chinese propaganda always like this? Are they just delusional or is it a …
entry.content: Why is Chinese propaganda always like this? Are they just delusional or is it a CCP directive? Seriously, no one is gonna build mission critical software on Chinese models because they're open sores or because it's cheaper. This ain't Walmart, the consumers are more critical. Nobody swapped out their Google Pixels or Samsungs for Xiaomi either. Is it just a feeling of inferiority that drives these crazy claims?

entry.title: /g/ Technology: GMAIL IS TRAAAASH
entry.content: Gmail is forcing me to give them my phone number, I inserted the correct mail and password, the same password I have been using for years, and it's now saying "uhm, actually man, we can't sign you up, you need to give us your phone number so we can send a verification message, no other way, sorry, you just lost your account forever unless you comply" I hate them, I will go to their offices and murder them. What are some emails that don't require this bullshit?

entry.title: /g/ Technology: >Be me >Have Microslop laptop >Want to enable Bitlocker because I'm paranoid abo…
entry.content: >Be me >Have Microslop laptop >Want to enable Bitlocker because I'm paranoid about smackheads nicking my drive. >Go to Privacy and Security >Find out you need Windows 11 Pro to use Bitlocker >Guess Device Encryption will have to do. >As Device Encryption is nearing completion laptop suddenly freezes. >Not sure what to do so I hold down power button to force a shutdown like an idiot. >Big mistake. Met with a boot loop on startup >Oh well, I have C drive backups from last month. >Boot up recovery

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Mo Bitar, the guy who got rich inventing Standard Notes, says tech skills are b…
entry.content: Mo Bitar, the guy who got rich inventing Standard Notes, says tech skills are basically worthless now and everything is either fully commoditized or will be shortly. He says he's trying to make games because there might still be a tiny bit of opportunity left there for a while, but otherwise there's no point to making apps. Tech Lead has said that taking your savings and moving to poor countries is the only arbitrage you have left, and if you don't have savings you are just flat out permafucked

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Time is passing by, things are getting bored
entry.content: Eventually, I'll lose my boyhood, I'm afraid of this happening, people will treat me differently, the world will treat me differently, next year I'll lose my boyhood. I wish I could stay young forever. Some people believe reincarnation isn't real and it pisses me off. You may nothing is forever, but nothing actually ends.

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Whatever you do, do not get two Styrofoam cups, fill one with water then put one…
entry.content: Whatever you do, do not get two Styrofoam cups, fill one with water then put one lid inside of the other lid to completely seal the water inside let the cup sit in the sun then try to drink from it later. You are basically drinking Styrofoam. You WILL get sick!! I had to learn this the hard way

entry.title: /news/ News: Ramaswamy Campaign Spends $500,000 on Credit Cards in Secret
entry.content: Ohio Republican Vivek Ramaswamy’s campaign for governor has racked up more than half a million dollars in credit card bills without disclosing what it’s purchasing. The campaign’s credit card spending has jumped dramatically in recent months. Just since April, Ramasawamy’s campaign has put $280,892 on an American Express card. Ohio campaign finance reports require campaigns to disclose each individual transaction — not just how much they spent but who they paid and what they purchased with the m

entry.title: /news/ News: EU HQ forced to shut down air-conditioning amid heatwave
entry.content: Cannot make this shit up https://www.politico.eu/article/eu- commission-heatwave-hq-forced-shut- down-air-conditioning-europe/ The European Commission’s headquarters was forced to shut down its air-conditioning system on Friday due to the heat wave. Staff working at the Berlaymont building received a text at midday, reading: “BERL — URGENT — Due to extreme weather conditions, forced shut down of air cooling system from floor 1 to 7 for the rest of the day.” The 13-story building is home to Commi

entry.title: /int/ International: Fascism is a direct descendant of Christianity: In Christianity, those who suffe…
entry.content: Fascism is a direct descendant of Christianity: In Christianity, those who suffer should be grateful for their suffering instead of rebelling, because suffering would lead the faithful (i.e., the suckers) to Heaven to sit beside the greatest sufferer in human history. In fascism, however, suffering is good, and those who suffer should be grateful for it, because suffering would make us stronger and tougher, more macho, more alpha, more stoic. And those who are hard on themselves would earn the r
